case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. ROBERT D WRIGHT et al

docket_entries.description: CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WRIGHT, ROBERT D IND AND DBA LASER WRIGHT POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $18,593.92 DAMAGES, $2,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $599.10 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,393.02, 1. COST INCLUDES INTEREST OF $458.10; 2. PER MARKET VALUE OF THE EQUIPMENT $2,500.00 SEE JUDGMENT LENGTH.
DECLARATION OF ERNEST I. KNOWLES RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED OCT-01-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, ROBERT D IND AND DBA LASER WRIGHT
